title: rpm-ostree bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:

  Resolves: #RHEL-90254

[2025.7-2]

  Resolves: #RHEL-85684

[2025.7-1]

  Resolves: #RHEL-85392
